news.title:
JK Paper delays hardwood BCTMP plant commissioning to Q1 FY26-27 from Q4 FY25-26.
The plant, in advanced erection stages, will aid chemical thermo mechanical pulp production.
news.summary:
JK Paper delays hardwood BCTMP plant commissioning to Q1 FY26-27 from Q4 FY25-26.
The plant, in advanced erection stages, will aid chemical thermo mechanical pulp production.

news.title:
JK Paper's Rs. 49.5 crore tax demand, incl. Rs. 15.2 crore interest, deleted.
Income Tax Commissioner Appeals raised no penalties or compliance issues for FY21-22.
news.summary:
JK Paper's Rs. 49.5 crore tax demand, incl. Rs. 15.2 crore interest, deleted.
Income Tax Commissioner Appeals raised no penalties or compliance issues for FY21-22.

news.title:
KP Energy wins LoA from JK Paper for a 91.4 MW hybrid project.
The wind-solar hybrid power project will be developed in Gujarat.
news.summary:
KP Energy wins LoA from JK Paper for a 91.4 MW hybrid project.
The wind-solar hybrid power project will be developed in Gujarat.

news.title:
JK Paper Ltd allotted 1.19 crore equity shares under a Scheme of Arrangement approved by NCLT Ahmedabad.
Promoter group shareholding rose to 52.9% post-allotment; equity capital increased to Rs. 181.3 crore.
news.summary:
JK Paper Ltd allotted 1.19 crore equity shares under a Scheme of Arrangement approved by NCLT Ahmedabad.
Promoter group shareholding rose to 52.9% post-allotment; equity capital increased to Rs. 181.3 crore.

news.title:
JK Paper allotted 1.19 crore equity shares to Enviro Tech shareholders, fully paid.
Paid-up equity capital rose to Rs.1813.2 crore; listing approval to be sought for new shares.
news.summary:
JK Paper allotted 1.19 crore equity shares to Enviro Tech shareholders, fully paid.
Paid-up equity capital rose to Rs.1813.2 crore; listing approval to be sought for new shares.

news.title: JK Paper reports reduced exports to Gulf countries, potentially impacting revenues.
news.summary: JK Paper reports reduced exports to Gulf countries, potentially impacting revenues.

news.title:
JK Paper Ltd's amalgamation scheme sanctioned by NCLT effective 15th March 2026.
Subsidiaries merged; authorised share capital increased to Rs. 1226.5 crore.
news.summary:
JK Paper Ltd's amalgamation scheme sanctioned by NCLT effective 15th March 2026.
Subsidiaries merged; authorised share capital increased to Rs. 1226.5 crore.

news.title:
JK Paper Ltd announces resignation of Subhendu Kesh, Head Digital & IT.
Resignation effective from 6th March 2026; no material reason cited.
news.summary:
JK Paper Ltd announces resignation of Subhendu Kesh, Head Digital & IT.
Resignation effective from 6th March 2026; no material reason cited.

news.title:
JK Paper's Q3 net profit fell to ₹274M from ₹654M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹17.63B, up from ₹16.32B YoY.
news.summary:
JK Paper's Q3 net profit fell to ₹274M from ₹654M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹17.63B, up from ₹16.32B YoY.

news.title:
JK Paper's board approves Rs. 500 crore hybrid solar-wind project.
Project to be funded via internal accruals and borrowings, commissioning in Q3 FY27-28.
news.summary:
JK Paper's board approves Rs. 500 crore hybrid solar-wind project.
Project to be funded via internal accruals and borrowings, commissioning in Q3 FY27-28.

news.title:
JK Paper reported 9M FY26 standalone revenue of Rs 4890 Cr and PAT of Rs 72.7 Cr.
Challenges include plant shutdowns, cheaper imports, forex impact; BPPL stake increased to 71.96%.
news.summary:
JK Paper reported 9M FY26 standalone revenue of Rs 4890 Cr and PAT of Rs 72.7 Cr.
Challenges include plant shutdowns, cheaper imports, forex impact; BPPL stake increased to 71.96%.

news.title:
JK Paper Ltd's amalgamation scheme involving subsidiaries and related firms was sanctioned by NCLT Ahmedabad on Feb 3, 2026.
The scheme restructures assets, consolidates businesses, and reduces intra-group transactions, awaiting filing with Registrar for effectiveness.
news.summary:
JK Paper Ltd's amalgamation scheme involving subsidiaries and related firms was sanctioned by NCLT Ahmedabad on Feb 3, 2026.
The scheme restructures assets, consolidates businesses, and reduces intra-group transactions, awaiting filing with Registrar for effectiveness.

news.title:
JK Paper Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 5th Feb 2026 to review and approve unaudited financial results.
The trading window remains closed from 1st Jan 2026 and reopens on 8th Feb 2026 per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
JK Paper Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 5th Feb 2026 to review and approve unaudited financial results.
The trading window remains closed from 1st Jan 2026 and reopens on 8th Feb 2026 per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
India Ratings reaffirmed JK Paper's ratings: IND AA (Stable) for bank loans, INDA1 for Commercial Papers.
The rated instruments include Rs. 9,200M bank loans, Rs. 1,000M Commercial Papers, and Rs. 300M Fixed Deposits.
news.summary:
India Ratings reaffirmed JK Paper's ratings: IND AA (Stable) for bank loans, INDA1 for Commercial Papers.
The rated instruments include Rs. 9,200M bank loans, Rs. 1,000M Commercial Papers, and Rs. 300M Fixed Deposits.

news.title:
JK Paper reports Q2 earnings facing margin pressure and GST impact.
The company announces a Rs 650 Cr capex push, says AS Mehta.
news.summary:
JK Paper reports Q2 earnings facing margin pressure and GST impact.
The company announces a Rs 650 Cr capex push, says AS Mehta.

news.title:
JK Paper Ltd announces management changes; Shri Ninad Mukund Gadgil, CEO Packaging, and Shri Raghavendra Hebbar, VP Works, join senior management.
Shri Gadgil and Shri Hebbar bring extensive leadership experience, Gadgil from Murugappa Group, and Hebbar with 31 years in the pulp and paper industry.
news.summary:
JK Paper Ltd announces management changes; Shri Ninad Mukund Gadgil, CEO Packaging, and Shri Raghavendra Hebbar, VP Works, join senior management.
Shri Gadgil and Shri Hebbar bring extensive leadership experience, Gadgil from Murugappa Group, and Hebbar with 31 years in the pulp and paper industry.

news.title:
JK Paper's board approved Q2 H1 FY26 results; standalone net profit at ₹129.8 cr.
Consolidated net profit reached ₹217.2 cr; acquired majority stakes in RWPL, BPPL.
news.summary:
JK Paper's board approved Q2 H1 FY26 results; standalone net profit at ₹129.8 cr.
Consolidated net profit reached ₹217.2 cr; acquired majority stakes in RWPL, BPPL.

news.title:
JK Paper's Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹2.4B from ₹2.95B YoY, showing reduced profitability.
EBITDA margin declines to 13.95% from 17.59% YoY, indicating weaker operational efficiency.
news.summary:
JK Paper's Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹2.4B from ₹2.95B YoY, showing reduced profitability.
EBITDA margin declines to 13.95% from 17.59% YoY, indicating weaker operational efficiency.
